title: schoenia ramosissima
intro: Schoenia ramosissima, also known as the branched corkscrew grass or woolly-headed corkscrew grass, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Schoenia ramosissima include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing inflammation and congestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
